sections.title: If the player is on the dock in East Ardougne

lines.speaker: Captain Barnaby
lines.text: Hello there. Would you like to travel somewhere? I can take you to Rimmington or Brimhaven for 30 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go to Rimmington.

lines.speaker: Captain Barnaby
lines.text: Come back when you've got 30 coins for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to go to Brimhaven.

lines.speaker: Captain Barnaby
lines.text: Come back when you've got 30 coins for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm good thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Or I could pay you nothing at all...

lines.speaker: Captain Barnaby
lines.text: Well that seems totally reasonable. Where would you like to go?
